violations.claim: Claim: The advice is printed **iff** the contract lookup failed.
violations.smt2:
; LINE: 345
; PRINCIPLE: P5  (Semantic Correctness – advice should only appear when a contract is truly missing)
; Claim: The advice is printed **iff** the contract lookup failed.

; Re‑use the same facts as line 344
(declare-const relPath String)
(declare-const line Int)
(declare-fun hasContract (String Int) Bool)

; Advice printed ⇔ hasContract is false
; Model the printing as a Boolean flag
(declare-const advicePrinted Bool)
(assert (= advicePrinted (not (hasContract relPath line))))

; Negate the claim (i.e., advice printed while contract actually exists)
(assert (hasContract relPath line))

(check-sat)
; sat → reachable inconsistency (advice could be printed even though a contract exists)
